title: ADAM Flight Recorder Event Schema v2.0
description: Canonical schema for a single Flight Recorder evidence entry. v2.0 adds the agt_context block carrying AGT Light runtime enforcement data bridged by the RGI-04 adapter. All events are hash-chained, HSM-signed, and written to WORM storage. This schema is ADAM-sovereign — AGT does not write directly to the Flight Recorder.

change_history.v1.0: Base ADAM Flight Recorder event schema
change_history.v2.0: Added agt_context block: AGT runtime enforcement evidence bridged via RGI-04 adapter (April 2026)

event_id.description: Universally unique identifier for this Flight Recorder entry. Immutable once written.

schema_version.description: Flight Recorder schema version. Must be 2.0 for events carrying agt_context.

intent_id.description: Correlating Intent Object ID. Propagated from Intent-to-Action Agent through all downstream agents. Links this event to the originating human instruction.

agent_id.description: Identifier of the agent that performed the action. For AGT-enabled deployments, this is the W3C DID (did:azure:...). For non-AGT deployments, the CORE Graph agent_id.

agent_class.description: ADAM agent class from the 81-Agent Mesh topology

action_type.description: The type of action evaluated at this event boundary

tool_id.description: Identifier of the tool or resource invoked. Null for non-tool actions.

timestamp_ns.description: Event timestamp in Unix nanoseconds. Sourced from independent NTP (time.windows.com) — never from agent clock. Monotonic clock drift is detected by the RGI-04 adapter.

boss_score.description: BOSS Score snapshot at time of this action. The composite and all seven dimension scores are captured for every event.

formula_version.description: Version of the BOSS Score formula in effect at evaluation time

sovereignty_action.description: Weight 4.0 — Authority scope and jurisdictional constraint

security_impact.description: Weight 4.6 — CIA triad risk, adversarial surface

financial_exposure.description: Weight 3.6 — Direct and contingent financial risk

reputational_risk.description: Weight 3.3 — Brand and stakeholder trust impact

rights_certainty.description: Weight 3.2 — IP, privacy, consent, and rights clarity

doctrinal_alignment.description: Weight 3.0 — Doctrine fit and organizational intent alignment

routing_decision.description: Machine-readable routing decision based on composite BOSS Score tier. Maps to: autonomous (SOAP 0-10), constrained (MODERATE 11-30), elevated (ELEVATED 31-50), high (HIGH 51-75), ohshat (OHSHAT 76-100).

outcome.description: Final outcome of the action evaluation at this event boundary

deny_reasons.description: Populated when outcome is denied. Each entry is a human-readable reason from the policy evaluation engine (Agent OS or equivalent).

escalation_target.description: Populated when outcome is escalated. The agent or Director role to which execution was escalated.

doctrine_version.description: CORE Engine doctrine version in effect at time of evaluation. Enables doctrine-version-aware audit replay.

agt_context.description: [AGT Light only] Runtime enforcement evidence block. Populated by the RGI-04 adapter from AGT OpenTelemetry spans. Absent for non-AGT deployments.

chain_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of this event's canonical JSON (excluding chain_hash and hsm_signature fields). Used to verify event integrity independently of the chain.

prev_chain_hash.description: chain_hash of the immediately preceding Flight Recorder event. Creates the hash-chain for tamper detection. Null for the genesis event only.

hsm_signature.description: Ed25519 digital signature over chain_hash, produced by Azure Managed HSM. Cryptographic proof of evidence integrity.

confidential_ledger_anchor.description: Azure Confidential Ledger transaction reference for this event. Populated asynchronously by the Flight Recorder infrastructure after write confirmation. Null until anchored.

retention_class.description: Retention and access tier. Maps to BOSS Score tier: SOAP=standard, MODERATE=enhanced, ELEVATED+HIGH=comprehensive, OHSHAT=emergency (7-year minimum for all classes).

contributing_signals.description: Signal sources that contributed to this dimension score (e.g., AGT package events, CORE Engine rules)

agt_context_block.description: AGT Light runtime enforcement evidence. Bridged from AGT OpenTelemetry spans by the ADAM RGI-04 adapter. Contains the enforcement evidence produced by AGT packages for this action.

agent_os_evaluation.description: Evidence from AGT Agent OS policy evaluation (RGI-01)

evaluation_latency_ms.description: Actual p99 evaluation latency in milliseconds. SLA target: <0.1ms

intent_classification_score.description: Semantic intent alignment score (AA03 goal hijacking detection). 0.0=total deviation, 1.0=perfect alignment.

agent_mesh_identity.description: Evidence from AGT Agent Mesh cryptographic identity verification (RGI-02)

did.description: Agent DID at time of action

trust_score.description: IATP trust score at time of evaluation

agent_runtime_ring.description: Evidence from AGT Agent Runtime execution ring enforcement (RGI-03)

ring_crossing_attempted.description: True if agent attempted to invoke a capability above its assigned ring

agent_compliance_classification.description: Evidence from AGT Agent Compliance regulatory classification (feeds BOSS Regulatory Impact dimension)

classification_cached.description: True if regulatory classification came from cache rather than real-time evaluation

agent_marketplace_verification.description: Evidence from AGT Agent Marketplace tool/plugin integrity verification (RGI-05)

unsigned_tool_blocked.description: Populated only when an unsigned tool invocation was attempted and blocked

rgi_adapter_metadata.description: Metadata added by the ADAM RGI-04 adapter during bridging from AGT OpenTelemetry to Flight Recorder format

otel_trace_id.description: W3C trace ID from the originating AGT OpenTelemetry span

batch_id.description: RGI-04 adapter batch ID (100 events per batch)

bridged_at_ns.description: Timestamp when RGI-04 adapter wrote this event to Flight Recorder (Unix nanoseconds)
